---
title: "Exemplar analyses"
subtitle: "Worked examples on real generated arms"
---

Each page here is a full engagement: the client-facing case brief exactly as
an analyst would receive it, and an analysis that answers the client's own
questions, in the order asked, following the
[Analysis catalog](../analysis-catalog.qmd).

- **[Malm's Market — a three-year engagement](malm-market.qmd)** — a
  neighborhood grocer three years in, deciding whether to renew a lease
  after a record-revenue year that somehow netted him nothing. Covers
  descriptive P&L, trend/seasonality decomposition, shrinkage forensics, an
  observational competitor-impact estimate, a full-cost staffing
  counterfactual, customer-panel churn, and a 2028 forecast — Layers 0, 1,
  3, 4, 5, and 7 of the catalog in one pass.

More pages will be added here over time. In the meantime, `archive/analyses/`
in the [main repository](https://github.com/ChinhMaiGit/grocery-sim/tree/main/archive/analyses)
already has a full-depth, graded notebook for every layer of the catalog,
and the package's own `sim.create_analysis(path)` scaffolds a starting
[marimo](https://marimo.io/) notebook against any run you generate yourself.
